description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular plot featuring a spacious green lawn, mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to a carport. The main building has a flat roof and a clean, white facade with large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. A detached structure at the rear serves as a garden pavilion or guest house, adjacent to an outdoor dining area with a table and chairs. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small patio with lounge chairs, and landscaped garden beds. The backyard is expansive, offering open grassy space and shaded areas beneath the trees. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor leisure, and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious fenced yard featuring a garden pavilion, driveway, and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with cars, and the garden pavilion at the back, with a clear view of the outdoor dining area and lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the flat roof, and the arrangement of trees and garden pavilion in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, garden pavilion, outdoor lounge area, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bungalow's side elevation, the garden pavilion, and the open lawn with trees and patio furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
